metadata.title: Refund Request
metadata.description: Request a refund for your credits. We process refund requests via email.

seo.title: How Refund Requests Work
paragraphs: Use this page to submit a refund request for unused credits. Include the reason for your request, the number of credits involved, and enough account or payment details for the support team to verify the purchase.

Refund requests are reviewed manually. This helps us confirm account ownership, understand the issue, and respond with the right resolution for duplicate purchases, accidental orders, or billing problems.
After submission, the team follows up by email with the review result, any follow-up questions, and the final processing status.

title: Refund Request
description: Fill out the form below to request a refund. We will review your request and contact you via email.
sign_in_required: Please sign in to request a refund

fields.reason_placeholder: Please explain why you are requesting a refund...
fields.account_placeholder: Please provide your account details (e.g., email, payment method, transaction ID)...
fields.credits_amount_placeholder: Enter the number of credits to refund
fields.description_placeholder: Any additional information you would like to provide...

submit_success: Refund request submitted successfully. We will process your request and contact you via email.
submit_failed: Failed to submit refund request. Please try again later.
invalid_credits_amount: Please enter a valid credits amount
insufficient_credits_for_refund: You must have more than 3 credits to request a refund
insufficient_credits_message_suffix: credits. You need more than 3 credits to request a refund.
note: Note: Refund requests are processed via email. Please allow 3-5 business days for processing.

my_requests.title: My Refund Requests
my_requests.no_requests: You haven't submitted any refund requests yet.
